title: Per-query prefix override
prompt: Write `MyApp.Tenant.Repo.list_products_for/1` that takes a tenant string, constructs `from p in Product, where: p.in_stock == true`, and runs `Repo.all(query, prefix: tenant)`. Write to lib/my_app/tenant/repo.ex.
tier_rationale: Single-function with one Ecto option. Medium because the prefix: placement matters (on Repo.all, not on from).
